note: Pricing is not listed online as rates vary depending on year group (primary/high school), format (in-home/online), and individual requirements. Contact us for a personalised quote with no obligation.

tiers.name: Bronze
tiers.label: Starter Package
tiers.description: A solid foundation of regular tutoring support — ideal for students who need consistent academic assistance without the extra bells and whistles.

tiers.name: Gold
tiers.label: Premium Package
tiers.description: Our most comprehensive package — maximum support, resources, and personalised attention for students who want to get the most out of their tutoring.

tiers.name: Silver
tiers.label: Standard Package
tiers.description: A well-rounded tutoring plan with added extras — great for students who want consistent support across more than one subject area.
